source_name: Ministry of Water and Energy ADELE
evidence: 2019/20 baseline: 882 MV interruptions and 2,103 interruption hours.

source_name: Addis Standard report republished by OrePulse
evidence: More than 25,000 outage-related problems reportedly identified; 54% resolved.

geography: Addis Ababa and parts of Ethiopia
source_name: Xinhua report republished by The Star
evidence: A blackout hit parts of Ethiopia including Addis Ababa; report cited a technical fault in the main grid.
EEU launched distribution-line reconstruction and capacity upgrades to improve reliability.
